description_html:
Groovy Moovy is a high-energy group dance competition that celebrates teamwork, coordination, creativity, and stage presence.

Team Size:

  • 2 to 15 participants per team

Number of Rounds:

  • 2 Rounds

Round 1: Prelims (Online):

  • Teams must submit a group dance performance video during registration.
  • The video must include all registered team members.
  • Performance duration: 1–2 minutes.

Round 2: Finals (Offline):

  • Shortlisted teams will perform live on stage.
  • Teams may perform to any song(s).
  • Single unified performance by the entire team.
  • Performance duration: 4–7 minutes.
  • The final round will be held during the Savara Fest.

Qualification & Communication:

  • Teams qualified for the final round will be notified via email or WhatsApp before the fest.
  • Qualified teams will be assigned a designated performance time slot.
  • Failure to perform at the allotted time will result in disqualification.

Important Guidelines & Notes:

  • A valid event/fest pass is mandatory to participate and perform.
  • No props or costumes will be provided by the institute.
  • The time limit includes prop setup on stage.
  • Teams must not spoil the stage or exceed the allotted time.
  • The institute is not responsible for any audio file errors.
  • Participants must arrive on time for the offline round.

Disqualification:

  • Exceeding the time limit
  • Missing the assigned performance slot
  • Violating stage or event guidelines
